title: GUI by Aiu Nekomachi
description: A simple GUI skin created using my personal colors.
body:
# Summary
Hello from Japan,Nice to meet you, I'm Aiu Nekomachi.
This is a GUI skin I designed.
It is a resource pack that includes all UI and some block skins.

# Concept
- Minimal decoration
- Flat design
- Rounded edges
- Earth tones
- High readability

# Supported versions
1.20.1 and versions before and after it
This depends on the version I am playing myself.
Please let me know if anyone would like me to create other versions.

https://x.com/aiu_nekomachi

# Included items
- Survival and Creative UI
- Progress skins
- Option menu button skins
- Vanilla device GUI skins
- RS lamp and glass textures
- Rain particle textures
- Standard galaxy alphabet font

# Recommended resource packs to use in combination
The Icon-Cat Font
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jdk-ticf

MisakiGothic2forMC
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/misakigothic2formc
